<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk002.pdf#page=8 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p64 -->

I ANDEREIS TRAIINISTEIN . CRASSAII

<!-- header: I ANDKREIS TRAUNSTEIN · GRASSAU -->


[[File:Band11_chunk002_p008_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk002_p008_img002.jpg|thumb|W Hieronymus]]



[[File:Band11_chunk002_p008_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk002_p008_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk002_p008_img005.jpg|thumb|Bruderschaftsbild (Johann Nepomuk della Croce 1766)]]



[[File:Band11_chunk002_p008_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk002_p008_img007.jpg|thumb|W<sub>4</sub> Augustinus]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p65 -->
